rootCauseHypothesis:
TEST FAILURE

The required interaction is not available — the large Loop ring's colored arc segments are not exposed as interactive controls, so the test action (click the ring arc for iteration 2) cannot be performed.

Observations:
- The Loop ring SVG is present on the page but no per-arc interactive elements (tabIndex or role=button) are exposed in the interactive element list; only the SVG itself is shown without interactive child indexes.
- The only interactive iteration controls available in the UI are the replay-rail "Seek to iteration" diamond buttons below the ring (these are visible and indexed), which the test explicitly disallows using instead of the ring arcs.
- Multiple DOM enumeration attempts confirmed the absence of exposed interactive arc segments; therefore the story-card interaction via the ring arc cannot be executed as requested.
